Site.title: GetPDFPro
Site.tagline: All your PDF tools. Private. Free.

hero.eyebrow: 26 tools. Zero file size limits for Pro.
hero.title: All your PDF tools.
hero.subtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert, OCR, redact, sign, and more. Browser-first, end-to-end encrypted, no account needed for the basics.

Home.toolsHeading: 26 tools, no upload limit for Pro
Home.toolsSubheading: Every tool runs in your browser. End-to-end encrypted. No account needed for the basics.

encrypted.title: End-to-end encrypted
encrypted.body: Files are encrypted in your browser and decrypted only by you. We can't read them, and neither can anyone else.

languages.title: 25+ languages
languages.body: Read and write in your language. AI features and the interface are localized at launch.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.body: Summarize, translate, rewrite, and answer questions about your PDFs with Gemini under the hood.

privacy.title: GDPR & CCPA ready
privacy.body: Built for privacy from day one. SOC 2 controls in place. Your files are auto-deleted in 1 hour.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. Cancel anytime.
pricing.subtitle: Free for the basics. Pro for heavy use. No surprises.

Tools.indexSubtitle: 26 PDF tools. One at a time. Each runs in your browser and is free forever for the basics.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Free for the basics. Pro for serious work. No hidden fees.
